titleStmt.title: SII 38.367: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 367. (A.R. No. 367 of 1912.) DĒVIKĀPURAM, ARNI TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the north wall, first prākāra, Bṛihadāmba temple.

p.hi: King: Kṛishṇadevamahārāya Year: Śaka 1452, Sarvasiddhi (Sarvadhāri) Kāttigai śu. 10, Saturday = Irregular.

summary.p: This inscription records that the temple officials (dāṉamayēśurar) conferred the right of cultivation, uḻavukāṇiāṭchi of the land called Kāmākshirāvuttāṉi, a land owned by the Tirumalar-uḍaiyanāyiṉār temple (tiruṉāmakkāṇi) at Dēvakkāpuram, on a certain Ambalattāḍiyāṟ. The latter village was situated in Murugamaṅgalappaṟṟu, an adjacent territory of Rajagaṁbhīraṉmalai in Mēlkuṉṟa-nāḍu in Palkuṉṟa-kkōṭṭam (a subdivision) of Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam. It is also stated that the recipient Ambalattaḍiyār had to reclaim the land and remit 15 paṇam and twenty-kalam of paddy annually at the temple treasury in lieu of the taxes. Further, he was also given a house at Maṇiyakāṟa-tteṟuvu in Dēvakkāpuṟam.
The tāṉattār, Karaiēṟaviṭṭār Chandranambi and several others including Uttaṇḍi, the temple accountant figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śuhastiśrī maṉ makāmaṇṭalecurametiṉi micura kaṇṭa kaṭṭāri cāḷuva śrīvirappiṟutāvaṉ kiṣṇatevamakāravirāyar
piṟutivirācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa cakāṟtam 1000 4 100 5 10 2 mel cellāniṉṟa caṟuvacitti varuṣam kāttikaimātam pūṟuva
pakṣattu tecamiyum Uttiramum peṟṟa caṉivārattunāḷ ceyaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu palkuṉṟakoṭṭattu
melkuṉṟa nāṭu yirāca kempiraṉ malaikku Aṭutta paṟṟu murukamaṅkalappaṟṟu tevastāṉam tevakkāpuramRead puramtirumalaruṭaiya
nāyiṉār tiruṉāmakkāṇiāṉa kāmākṣirāvuttāṇi tāṅkal tāṉamayecurar kaikkoḷamutaliyaḷukku te pa ṟamaḷatta nayiṉār
makaṉ Ampalattāṭiyāṟku Uḻavukāṇiākṣi paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi nāṅkaḷ yivaṟku kāmākṣi yirāvuttaṉ tāṅkal nañcai
puñcai Uṇṭāṉatum Uḻavukāṇi Āka kuṭukkaiyil yiva tāṅkalile veṇṇa nilamu tiruttatiRead tiruttikoṇṭu kāṇikkai kaṭṭāyam maṟṟum
Eppeṟpaṭṭa cakalaupātiyum Uḷpaṭa malaiyāṅkaṭṭukuttakai Āka koyilpaṇṭārattukku varuṣam 1 kku celuttum ø 10 5 ḷa 2 1000 tevakkapuṟam
maṇiyakāṟatteruvil Olai Eḻutāviṭṭukku meṟku maṉai Oṉṟu yinta tāṅkalum maṉaiyum yivaṟku cantirādhittavaraikku kāṇiākṣi Āka
paṇṇik kuṭuttom yivar koyilpaṇṭārattukku varuṣam 1 kku patiṉ Añcu yirupatiṉkalanellum varuṣam varuṣam toṟum celuttu
cukattile yirukkakaṭaivar Ākavum yintataṉmattukku Akitam paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ keṅkaikaraiyile kārāmpacuvai koṉṟa pāvattile pokakaṭaivar Ākavum
yivai tāṉattār karaieṟaviṭṭa cantiranampi Uḷḷiṭṭār Eḻuttu yivai māyecurar tirumalaiccivaṉ kaṅkāṇi tiruppaṇiThe ward tiruppaṇi is written below the line.Āṇṭār Uḷḷiṭṭār Eḻuttu
kaikkoḷa mutaliyaḷ kaḷappāḷar kāliṅkayirāyar kollāviṭṭa [ ] vallāṉai veṉṟār kaṇṭitevar veṭanayiṉār vāṇapāṭi Uḷḷiṭṭār Eḻuttu
yippaṭikku yinta kalveṭṭu Eḻutiṉamaikku koyilkaṇakku Uttaṇṭi Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 38.367 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
